summary: Issue #466 P2-9-4 Revenue partition E2E: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. backfill_revenue_partition skips complete partitions, fetches A-36+A-37 with budget accounting, upserts shop-grain GMV/orders/customers, marks complete only after upsert; failure paths leave partition incomplete. Six unit tests pass with fixtures; no live Partner; Section B write APIs never invoked; GMV not Net Revenue.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: MODULE.md documents backfill_revenue_partition public API.
Intent-review note: A-37 hourly customers sum fallback when overall absent is implemented but lacks a dedicated pytest (primary overall path covered by fixture test).
criticalFindings.suggestion: Optional follow-up: add fixture variant without overall.customers to assert hourly sum path.

mappings.criterion: fixture backfill upserts shop grain row gmv orders customers
skips partner calls when partition complete
partner rate limit leaves partition incomplete
upsert is idempotent on snapshot key
derives aov from gmv and orders
